headline: Coca-Cola shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and raised its FY26 adjusted EPS guidance above estimates.
summary: Coca-Cola shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and raised its FY26 adjusted EPS guidance above estimates.

headline: Totino's™ Brings Fan-Favorite Snack Hacks to Life with New Pizza Rolls™ and Ultimate Pizza™ Flavors
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, July 16, 2026--Totino's is amping up the flavor in the freezer aisle with new Pizza Rolls™ and Ultimate Pizza™ inspired by the bold flavor combos and snack hacks fans already love. From Garlic Parm and Zesty Limón to Chicken Bacon Ranch and Mexican Style, the new flavors are rolling out nationwide this summer, delivering even more craveable ways to satisfy snack attacks.

headline: Is Walmart’s Regenerative Farming Push Reshaping Its Supply Chain Edge And Brand Story (WMT)?
summary: In recent days, General Mills, ADM and Walmart launched a collaboration to advance regenerative agriculture across 40,000 Midwest wheat acres, offering technical and financial support to farmers adopting practices such as no-till and cover crops. This cross-sector effort reinforces Walmart’s focus on supply chain resilience and sustainability, with implications for long-term sourcing reliability and brand strength. We’ll now examine how this push into regenerative agriculture shapes...

headline: Bear of the Day: General Mills (GIS)
summary: Faced with the dual pressures of shifting consumer habits and emerging health trends, General Mills finds itself in a challenging market position.

headline: Micron and General Mills have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Micron's AI-driven memory momentum earns Bull of the Day, while General Mills faces pressure from softer demand and ongoing operating challenges.
